name: Kimi Code
description: Moonshot AI Kimi K2.6 via the platform.moonshot.ai OpenAI-compatible API. Contributes both chat and agent providers. Requires a Moonshot API key.
author: Nimbalyst

minMoonshotApiVersion.description: Minimum Moonshot platform API version this extension targets. Bumped via extension update without a Nimbalyst release. Mirrors the antigravity IDE version-pin pattern (Greg, issue #96).

marketplace.tagline: Moonshot Kimi K2.6 via the Kimi Code CLI login
marketplace.longDescription: Two providers (chat and agent) that ride your existing Kimi Code CLI authentication. Run /login in the Kimi Code CLI once and Nimbalyst picks up the OAuth credentials from ~/.kimi/credentials/kimi-code.json automatically; no API key entered in Nimbalyst. The chat provider sends one-shot prompts, the agent provider runs a tool-loop with meta-agent host support (a Kimi agent session can spawn Claude or Codex child sessions mid-loop). Default model is kimi-for-coding (Kimi K2.6, 256K context) at api.kimi.com/coding/v1. Token refresh is handled in-process via the same auth.kimi.com endpoint the CLI uses.
highlights: Auth rides your existing Kimi Code CLI /login - no API key entered in Nimbalyst
Kimi K2.6 chat provider with 256K context window
Agent provider with tool-loop and meta-agent host mode
Spawn Claude or Codex child sessions from a Kimi agent loop
Background token refresh against auth.kimi.com (same flow the CLI uses)
